name: @symphony/plugin-chrome-devtools-mcp-example
description: Symphony browser plugin SKELETON for Chrome DevTools MCP — interactive control of the USER's live logged-in Chrome via CDP. Hardcoded Tier 3, act-only, away-disabled, automation-rejected. Non-functional (Phase 9D): declares the FULL mandatory security envelope + a realistic CDP tool surface, but the handlers are stubs. The highest-risk surface in Symphony's browser stack — read the README before enabling a real build.
